title: Limit line length for better readability
description: Lines that are too long force developers to scroll horizontally, significantly reducing code readability and making it harder to review code efficiently. Shorter lines improve code comprehension and maintainability.
recommendation: Break long lines into multiple shorter lines or refactor complex expressions.

noncompliant.description: Lines that exceed recommended length (typically 80-120 characters) force horizontal scrolling and reduce readability.

compliant.description: Breaking long lines into multiple shorter lines improves readability and eliminates horizontal scrolling.

checks.message: Line exceeds 120 characters and should be broken for readability
